# An R interface to childes-db

The `childesr` package allows you to access data in the childes-db from
R. This removes the need to write complex SQL queries in order to get
the information you want from the database. This vignette shows some
examples of how to use the data loading functions and what the resulting
data look like.

### Install `childesr` from this GitHub repository:

    # install.packages("devtools")
    devtools::install_github("langcog/childesr")

### Tutorial

To get a hands on walk-through on how to use `childesr` to access
`childes-db`, check out this
[tutorial](https://langcog.github.io/childes-db-website/api.html).

### Other relevant GitHub repositories

- Website frontend: <http://github.com/langcog/childes-db-website>
- Interactive data visualizations:
  <https://github.com/langcog/childes-db-shiny>

# Package index

## All functions

- [`clear_connections()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/clear_connections.md)
  : Clear all MySQL connections
- [`connect_to_childes()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/connect_to_childes.md)
  : Connect to CHILDES
- [`get_collections()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_collections.md)
  : Get collections
- [`get_content()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_content.md)
  : Get content
- [`get_contexts()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_contexts.md)
  : Get the utterances surrounding a token(s)
- [`get_corpora()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_corpora.md)
  : Get corpora
- [`get_db_info()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_db_info.md)
  : Get information on database connection options
- [`get_participants()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_participants.md)
  : Get participants
- [`get_speaker_statistics()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_speaker_statistics.md)
  : Get speaker statistics
- [`get_sql_query()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_sql_query.md)
  : Run a SQL Query script on the CHILDES database
- [`get_table()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_table.md)
  : Get table
- [`get_tokens()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_tokens.md)
  : Get tokens
- [`get_transcripts()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_transcripts.md)
  : Get transcripts
- [`get_types()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_types.md)
  : Get types
- [`get_utterances()`](https://langcog.github.io/childesr/reference/get_utterances.md)
  : Get utterances
